build.notes: Build completed successfully with expected webpack performance warnings. No TypeScript or compilation errors.

lint.notes: Tabs block has one exhaustive-deps warning which is intentional (documented by Developer). Unrelated blocks (Hero, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel) have lint errors but these are not blocking for Tabs QA.

issues.description: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies warning
issues.reason: Developer documented this as intentional pattern to prevent infinite loops while syncing child attributes

details.attributes: tabsColor and providesContext correctly defined in Tabs block.json; tabColor and usesContext correctly defined in TabsItem block.json
details.filesExist: All required files present (block.json, Tabs.tsx, Tabs.php, Tabs.js for both parent and child blocks)

tabsColor.verification: Correctly syncs from child tabColor attributes, rendered in test page variation 7 with values ['', 'blue', 'orange', 'purple']

tabColor.verification: Per-tab color attribute working correctly, rendered with data-tab-color attributes on buttons

testCases.notes: Test page variation 6 has only 1 tab item. Page audit confirms 1 tab button and 1 panel.
Test page variation 5 has 8 tab items. Page audit confirms 8 tab buttons and 8 panels.
Test page variation 3 has no eyebrow, description, buttons, or tab descriptions. Renders correctly.
Test page variation 4 has very long heading (200+ chars) and long tab titles. Page audit confirms heading rendered correctly.
Test page variation 8 has descriptions on all tabs. Verified via test page content.

testsRun.test: Desktop tab switching - ArrowDown keyboard navigation
testsRun.notes: Keyboard navigation works with ArrowDown/ArrowUp for vertical tablist. JS implements correct vertical navigation pattern.
Clicking blue tab applies blue color class to panels container. Visual verification shows correct color applied.
Clicking purple tab removes blue color class and applies purple. Color class toggling works correctly.
Mobile accordion opens on click using native details/summary behavior. Per-tab color classes applied to details elements.

patternCompliance.notes: The 4 'failed' checks are false negatives. The automated test checks for ArrowLeft/ArrowRight (horizontal tablist pattern) but this block correctly implements ArrowDown/ArrowUp (vertical tablist pattern). The tablist has aria-orientation='vertical' in both TSX and PHP. All ARIA attributes are correctly present in server-rendered HTML before JS enhancement.

ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-002: pass - Tablist has aria-label (uses heading value, falls back to 'Tabs')
ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-004: pass - All tabs have aria-controls referencing panels
ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-005: pass - Exactly one tab has aria-selected='true'
ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-006: pass - All inactive tabs have aria-selected='false'
ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-008: pass - All panels have aria-labelledby referencing tabs
ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-009: pass - All aria-controls reference existing IDs
ariaChecks.TABS-ARIA-010: pass - All aria-labelledby reference existing IDs

keyboardChecks.TABS-KB-001: false negative - Test expects ArrowRight but block correctly uses ArrowDown for vertical tablist
keyboardChecks.TABS-KB-002: false negative - Test expects ArrowLeft but block correctly uses ArrowUp for vertical tablist
keyboardChecks.TABS-KB-003: false negative - Wrapping works correctly with ArrowUp (not ArrowLeft)
keyboardChecks.TABS-KB-004: false negative - Wrapping works correctly with ArrowDown (not ArrowRight)

behavioralChecks.TABS-BHV-001: pass - Clicking second tab activates it
behavioralChecks.TABS-BHV-002: pass - Clicking first tab activates it

accessibilityFixes.requirement: Tablist must have aria-label or aria-labelledby
accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added aria-label to tablist in both Tabs.tsx (line 140) and Tabs.php (line 32). Uses heading value with fallback to 'Tabs'.
accessibilityFixes.verification: Verified via taktician_a11y_test - check TABS-ARIA-002 passes

accessibilityFixes.requirement: Tab buttons and panels must have ARIA attributes in server-rendered HTML
accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added aria-controls on tab buttons in Tabs.php (line 52). Added id, role='tabpanel', aria-labelledby, tabindex='0' on content panels in TabsItem.php (line 39).
accessibilityFixes.verification: Verified via taktician_a11y_test - checks TABS-ARIA-004, TABS-ARIA-007, TABS-ARIA-008, TABS-ARIA-009, TABS-ARIA-010 all pass

semanticHtml.notes: Uses semantic <section>, <button>, <details>/<summary> elements. Heading hierarchy correct (h2 for block heading, h3 for tab titles).

keyboardNavigation.notes: Vertical tablist uses ArrowDown/ArrowUp with wrapping. Implements Home/End for first/last tab. Space/Enter activates tabs. Tab key enters/exits tablist. JS code verified at Tabs.js lines 122-142.

markupDuplication.notes: No duplication. Tab content lives in a single <details> element. Desktop tablist controls which details is open (via JS). Mobile uses native details/summary behavior. Tablist is hidden on mobile via CSS, summaries are hidden on desktop via CSS - but content is not duplicated.

details.attributeExtraction: CORRECT - PHP does not manually extract attributes. Uses auto-extracted variables from inc/helpers/blocks.php pattern.
details.structure: TSX and PHP structures match. Same wrapper elements, same conditional classes, same ARIA attributes.
details.conditionalClasses: Color classes applied consistently in both TSX (line 159) and PHP (line 46).
details.ariaAttributes: aria-label on tablist (TSX line 140, PHP line 32), aria-controls on buttons (TSX via JS, PHP line 52), tabpanel attributes (TSX via JS, PHP line 39) all synced.

innerBlocks.notes: Allows only takt/tabs-item. Template inserts one default tab. Inner block content renders correctly on frontend. Test page has variations with 1-8 tab items all rendering correctly.

variations: Full Content - 4 tabs with eyebrow, description, buttons
Empty Optional Fields - 2 tabs, no optional fields
Long Content - 2 tabs with very long heading and content
Many Tabs (8 items) - 8 tabs edge case
Per-Tab Colors - 4 tabs with mixed colors (default, blue, orange, purple)
All Tabs With Descriptions - 3 tabs all with descriptions
Per-Tab Colors with Mixed Content - 3 tabs with individual colors (green, yellow, purple)

issues.description: React Hook useEffect exhaustive-deps warning in Tabs.tsx
issues.fix: This is intentional and documented by Developer. The useEffect intentionally limits dependencies to derived arrays (innerBlockTitles, innerBlockDescriptions, innerBlockColors) to prevent infinite loops while syncing child attributes. Adding all suggested dependencies would cause infinite re-renders.

New attributes (tabsColor, tabColor) correctly defined and synced
Accessibility gaps fixed - aria-label on tablist present in server HTML
Accessibility gaps fixed - aria-controls, tabpanel attributes present in server HTML
Per-tab color feature works correctly - color classes applied to buttons and panels container
Per-tab color JS toggling works - removes old color, applies new color on tab switch
Mobile accordion behavior works with per-tab colors
Keyboard navigation works with ArrowDown/ArrowUp for vertical tablist
Edge cases tested - single tab, 8 tabs, long content, empty optional fields
TSX/PHP sync verified - no manual attribute extraction, structures match
Test page has 9 comprehensive variations covering all requirements
Interactive behavior tested and working - tab switching, color switching, mobile accordion
